ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standard" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "hips_inches" TEXT /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size standard applies */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Size group (e.g., petite, tall, plus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the size standard */,
  "equivalent_size_id" INTEGER /* Equivalent size id in another region */,
  "equivalent_region" TEXT /* Region of the equivalent size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id", "region")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  "price" TEXT /* Product price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the product is available */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of items in inventory */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory will be restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standard ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_data" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement in cm */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Customer's hips measurement in cm */,
  "hips_inches" TEXT /* Customer's hips measurement in inches */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* Preferred size id of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES region ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_data ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendation" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size id for the customer */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendation_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendation_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_data ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendation_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES size_standard ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size standard
Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L)
Region where the size standard applies
Equivalent size id in another region
Unique identifier for each product category
Unique identifier for each inventory entry
Region where the product is available
Date when the inventory will be restocked
Region where the customer is located
